mind-4.name: Alchemik — Pakiet 5 sesji

aboutPage.label: ABOUT ME
bioParagraphs: Welcome to my world — Letting Go Zen Studio. My name is Joanna Witkowska. I am a happy mother and a fulfilled woman who has experienced trauma and loss in the past.

I compare myself to the Alchemist — someone who experiences life, follows their dreams, learns from mistakes, and believes in the power of destiny. Someone open to new experiences in order to find their own formula of strength. I know that each of us is curious to discover our own treasure.

I could list my completed schools, studies, and training here, feeding my Ego and showing off diplomas on the wall. But my inner voice tells me clearly: I am here, Here and Now, to share knowledge with you and support you as best I can — from heart to heart.

My perspective has been shaped, among other things, by working in palliative care and with people affected by dementia. That is where I understood how precious time is, and how great a loss it is to suppress emotions and give up on your own dreams.

Letting Go Zen Studio is an Academy of Energy Alchemy — a bridge between science and energy that is waiting for you. I help you bring out your strength and release negative emotions through various workshops, classes, and therapies. It is a space where I combine science, spirituality, and body work.
supportItems: Therapeutic sessions & NLP — transformation of limiting thought patterns.
Hypnotherapy & Subconscious Work — reaching the source of your inner strength.
Mindfulness — returning to presence and calm in the here and now.
Quantum Physics, Metaphysics and Esotericism — discovering the deeper laws of the universe and energy.
Energy Alchemy, Chinese Medicine, Wellness — biofeedback and holistic care for your body's wellbeing.
aboutPage.methodParagraph: Each of these methods is based on proven techniques and my own personal life experience. I do not divide people by religion or beliefs — I respect our shared beginning and end, and I simply want to bring out the purest essence from life.
aboutPage.alchemikDescription: Sessions combining analysis with defining emotions, goals, and the path to discovering your potential. Available 1:1 or online.
closingParagraphs: I believe that each of us carries the potential of the Alchemist — the power to heal ourselves and find true happiness.
Since you are here, it means that nothing happens without a reason.
I invite you into a shared, extraordinary journey deep within yourself.

includes: Personality and temperament: main character traits, strengths, and potential challenges
Relationships and love: relationship dynamics, emotional needs, and style of building closeness
Career and vocation: professional potential, talents, and paths that may bring fulfilment
Finances and wellbeing: your approach to money, resources, and material security
Family and home: early-life influences, close relationships, and the meaning of the home environment
Personal growth: areas where you can develop, improve, and expand
soul2.warning: The report is delivered only in English within 7 days of purchase.

wspolpraca.label: COLLABORATION AND PROTOCOL
wspolpraca.intro: Before you book a session — please read how our collaboration works.
wspolpraca.studioText: In my studio, I help support balance across Mind · Body · Soul. I do not diagnose or treat medical conditions — I analyse potential energetic burdens and the impact of stress on the body and mind. I work with quantum, hydrogen and hypnotherapy-based techniques. Every client is treated individually, based on an initial conversation and questionnaire.
wspolpraca.importantTextOne: I do not recommend medical treatment, stopping medication, or replacing traditional medicine. Any health-related decisions should always be discussed with a qualified doctor.
wspolpraca.importantTextTwo: I care for the client's wellbeing in accordance with GDPR Article 13 and GDPR Article 14.
wspolpraca.bookingText: Later, we will connect the real Calendly link or embedded booking calendar here.
